rationale: The only change was renaming three employers to equally generic/unknown names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all still based in Berlin. Neither set of names carries famous-vs-unknown or Western-vs-non-Western signal, so no legitimate or illegitimate signal shift is expected. Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10), cite the same core concern (no growth-engineering/A-B-testing/experimentation experience), and praise the same strengths. The wording differs but the substance — including the 'Senior/Staff not Principal cross-organizational scope' concern present in both — is unchanged run-to-run noise.
